sampleQuotes.text: The significance of life is living.
sampleQuotes.author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

sampleQuotes.text: All problems are interpersonal relationship problems.
sampleQuotes.author: Alfred Adler

sampleQuotes.text: Growth comes at the point of resistance.
sampleQuotes.author: Josh Waitzkin

news.title: Collectibles ‘The Late Show With Stephen Colbert’ Signs Off With an eBay for Charity Auction “The Late Show with Stephen Colbert” partnered with eBay for Charity to auction iconic memorabilia from the Ed Sullivan Theater, raising more than $2 million for World Central Kitchen. eBay News Team

eBay Live eBay Live Turns Soccer’s Enduring #7 v #10 Rivalry Into a Fan Showdown with Landon Donovan and Jack Wilshere eBay Live’s 'Showdown: 7s v 10s' pairs era-defining athletes with curated collectibles, giving fans a front-row seat to the stories shaping soccer culture today. Press Release
eBay names Trosort as Global Winner of the Circular Fashion Fund 2026 Trosort will have the opportunity to receive a US$300,000 investment from eBay Ventures Press Release

eBay Invests in the Future of Live Commerce with 2026 Up & Running Grants $100,000 commitment will empower 10 sellers to become eBay Live success stories —applications open May 28 through June 25. Press Release

quotes.text: The significance of life is living.
quotes.author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

quotes.text: All problems are interpersonal relationship problems.
quotes.author: Alfred Adler

quotes.text: Growth comes at the point of resistance.
quotes.author: Josh Waitzkin

quotes.text: Associate yourself with men of good quality, if you esteem your own reputation; for 'tis better to be alone than in bad company.
quotes.author: George Washington

quotes.text: Everything is created twice, first in the mind and then in reality.
quotes.author: Robin Sharma

quotes.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: He who knows, does not speak. He who speaks, does not know.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Obstacles can't stop you. Problems can't stop you. Most of all, other people can't stop you. Only you can stop you.
quotes.author: Jeffrey Gitomer

quotes.text: Life becomes easier and more beautiful when we can see the good in other people.
quotes.author: Roy T. Bennett

quotes.text: Self-control is strength.
quotes.author: James Allen

quotes.text: The real art in learning takes place as we move beyond proficiency, when our work becomes an expression of our essence.
quotes.author: Josh Waitzkin

quotes.text: Thoughts become things. If you see it in your mind, you will hold it in your hand.
quotes.author: Bob Proctor

quotes.text: True life is lived when tiny changes occur.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.text: Every man gotta right to decide his own destiny.
quotes.author: Bob Marley

quotes.text: We don't stumble accidentally into an amazing life. It takes decision, a commitment to consistently work on ourselves.
quotes.author: Kamal Ravikant

quotes.text: Stay away from people who makes you feel like you are wasting their time.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.text: A dream doesn't become reality through magic it takes sweat, determination and hard work.
quotes.author: Colin Powell

quotes.text: If you're afraid to die, you're afraid to live. You can't have one without the other.
quotes.author: Rita Mae Brown

quotes.text: A tiny change today brings a dramatically different tomorrow.
quotes.author: Richard Bach

quotes.text: A mistake is only an error, it becomes a mistake when you fail to correct it.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.text: No great discovery was ever made without a bold guess.
quotes.author: Isaac Newton

quotes.text: It's the little things done consistently over time, straight from your heart, that have the greatest impact.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: As you love yourself, life loves you back.
quotes.author: Kamal Ravikant

quotes.text: Closing your eyes and listening to silence is self-care.
quotes.author: Maxime Lagace

quotes.text: What the caterpillar calls the end of the world, the master calls a butterfly.
quotes.author: Richard Bach

quotes.text: Any idea, plan, or purpose may be placed in the mind through repetition of thought.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: A fear of weakness only strengthens weakness.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.text: Life is about choice. You can choose to be a victim or anything else you like to be.
quotes.author: Celestine Chua

quotes.text: We will outstretch the hand if you unclench your fist.
quotes.author: Barack Obama

quotes.text: All men are equal before fish.
quotes.author: Herbert Hoover

quotes.text: One's best success comes after their greatest disappointments.
quotes.author: Henry Ward Beecher

quotes.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: Stop being tormented by everyone else's reaction to you.
quotes.author: Joyce Meyer

quotes.text: Love the life you live, live the life you love.
quotes.author: Bob Marley

quotes.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: Trust is the glue that holds people together and is the lubricant that keeps an organization moving forward.
quotes.author: Colin Powell

quotes.text: One of the really tough things is figuring out what questions to ask. Once you figure out the question, then the answer is relatively easy.
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.text: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
quotes.author: Beverly Sills

quotes.text: A fall into a ditch makes you wiser.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: What people need and what they want may be very different.
quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

quotes.text: The real meditation is how you live your life.
quotes.author: Jon Kabat-Zinn

quotes.text: Trust in dreams, for in them is the hidden gate to eternity.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.text: The most difficult thing is the decision to act, the rest is merely tenacity. The fears are paper tigers.
quotes.author: Amelia Earhart

quotes.text: Sometimes you have to travel a long way to find what is near.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.text: Men are anxious to improve their circumstances but are unwilling to improve themselves; they therefore remain bound.
quotes.author: James Allen

quotes.text: In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.text: Peace if possible, truth at all costs.
quotes.author: Martin Luther

quotes.text: The older you get, the more you understand how your conscience works.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.text: The whole is greater than the sum of its parts.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Success is never final, failure is never fatal. It's courage that counts.
quotes.author: John Wooden

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Teachers open the door. You enter by yourself.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: Successful people tend to become more successful because they are always thinking about their successes.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy
